title: World Wonders
tagline: Continents, landmarks and cultures — a passport in a box.
description: From the Amazon to the Himalayas, each card pairs a stunning illustration with three fascinating facts and a 'find it on the map' challenge. Dinner-table geography your whole family will play.
benefits: Builds world awareness and map confidence
Three-fact format is perfect for family quiz nights
Sparks curiosity about cultures beyond the classroom
